title: Disable SeasonHUD Curios / Trinkets / Accessories Slot
body:
This datapack will disable **Curios/Trinkets/Accessories** support and remove the calendar slot for [SeasonHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasonhud) and [SeasonHUD (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasonhud-fabric) starting with version 1.9.7.

Add the datapack .zip to the ".minecraft\saves\WORLD_NAME\datapacks" folder. Once ingame you can use the "/datapack list" to ensure it is enabled.

You can also use a mod like [Global Packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks) and then add the datapack to the ".minecraft\resourcepacks" folder.
